settings.title: Strategy Session
settings.description: A complimentary 60-minute diagnostic conversation. We'll explore your challenge, share initial perspectives, and determine whether there's a fit.

settings.title: Full Engagement
settings.description: A multi-month transformation program with embedded consultants, defined milestones, and measurable outcomes. Our most common engagement type.

settings.title: Rapid Sprint
settings.description: A focused 2-4 week sprint for a specific challenge — market assessment, operational diagnostic, or strategic planning session.

settings.title: Availability
settings.text:
Monday — Friday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
We also meet clients at their offices.

settings.question: What does a typical engagement look like?
settings.answer: Every engagement starts with a diagnostic phase where we understand your challenge in depth. From there, we design a tailored strategy and work alongside your team to implement it. Most engagements run 3-6 months.

settings.question: How are your fees structured?
settings.answer: We use fixed-fee pricing tied to defined deliverables and outcomes. No hourly billing, no scope creep. We provide a detailed proposal with clear pricing before any work begins.

settings.question: Do you work with small businesses?
settings.answer: Our sweet spot is mid-market companies ($10M-$500M revenue) and growth-stage startups with institutional backing. That said, we evaluate every opportunity on its merits.

settings.question: What industries do you specialize in?
settings.answer: We have deep experience in healthcare, technology, financial services, manufacturing, and nonprofit. Our frameworks are industry-agnostic, but sector expertise accelerates results.
